subject: English
title: A Question of Trust – Easy SNS

key_points: The story is written by Victor Canning
Horace Danby is a respectable locksmith who secretly steals
He steals once a year to buy rare and expensive books
The story is mainly set at Shotover Grange
A young lady deceives Horace by pretending to be the owner’s wife
Horace trusts the young lady without verification
He leaves fingerprints on the safe and gets arrested
The story highlights the theme of trust and deception
The idea of honour among thieves is proved false
characters: Horace Danby – A locksmith and secret thief
The Young Lady – Clever, confident, and deceptive
Sherry – The dog that creates a sense of safety
important_events: Horace plans a robbery at Shotover Grange
He meets a young lady inside the house
The young lady tricks him into opening the safe
Horace removes his gloves and leaves fingerprints
He is arrested by the police
exam_tips: Remember the reason why Horace steals
Understand the role of the young lady clearly
Focus on the theme of trust in answers
Mention irony while writing long answers
Link the title with Horace’s downfall
